items.title: ‘This is fine’ creator says AI startup stole his art
items.summary: The ad comes from Artisan, the AI startup behind billboards urging businesses to "stop hiring humans."

items.title: In Harvard study, AI offered more accurate emergency room diagnoses than two human doctors
items.summary: A new study examines how large language models perform in a variety of medical contexts, including real emergency room cases — where at least one model seemed to be more accurate than human doctors.
